articles.title: Cardano Founder Fires Back At Crypto Report Asking Investors To Dump ADA
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson recently dismissed a report tarnishing the image of the crypto’s blockchain ecosystem. According to the report, the network currently has almost no real-world utility compared to other major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum. articles.description: There has already been more than $300 billion in stablecoin transfer volume in January, eclipsing December’s volume.
